page.title: Ops queue
page.subtitle: Cross-tenant pipeline health. No patient data is shown here.

table.empty: No stuck cases in the last 15 minutes.

detail.title: Case detail
detail.load_failed_body: Please retry or pick a different case.

confirm.retry_body: Re-queue from the last successful checkpoint. The submitter will be notified on completion.
confirm.cancel_body: This will stop the job gracefully. It can be retried later.
confirm.mark_blocked_body: Terminal state — the submitting clinician will receive an actionable notification.
confirm.mark_blocked_note_help: Scrubbed for PHI before storage — keep it free of patient details.
confirm.mark_blocked_note_placeholder: e.g., upstream inference service down; retry after 14:00

errors.load_body: The ops endpoint is unreachable. Retrying automatically.
